
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 8 - "Clipping".

The examples for this chapter require 56 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	Zstep1.ps
	Zstep2.ps
	Zstep3.ps
	Zstep4.ps
	Zstep5.ps
	bbox1.ps
	bbox2.ps
	bbox3.ps
	bbox4.ps
	bbox5.ps
	borro.ps
	clip1.ps
	clip2.ps
	clip3.ps
	clip4.ps
	clip5.ps
	clip6.ps
	fill.ps
	flatten.ps
	initial.ps
	intersct.ps
	outside1.ps (*)
	outside2.ps (*)
	outside3.ps (*)
	pentagon.ps
	plyback1.ps
	plyback2.ps (1)
	rect.ps (*)
	star.ps
	stroke1.ps
	stroke2.ps
	stroke3.ps

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	The example in the book left off the final showpage instruction.
	The example on the disk fixed this oversight.
	
